title: ChatUniTest: a ChatGPT-based automated unit test generation tool
test_generation_focus: Automated Java unit test generation with rule-based and LLM-based repair
dataset_or_subject_system: Java projects plus Defects4J and comparative baselines
methodology: Adaptive focal context plus validation and repair loop
key_findings: Improves branch and line coverage versus classic baselines and highlights the value of repair after raw generation
relevance_to_project: Directly motivates our normalization plus repair loop after raw model output

title: Automated Unit Test Improvement using Large Language Models at Meta
llm_or_agent_focus: Industrial LLM pipeline with assured filtering
test_generation_focus: Improvement of existing human-written unit tests
dataset_or_subject_system: Meta Instagram and Facebook Kotlin test suites
methodology: Multi-stage filtering pipeline for build pass flakiness and coverage gain
key_findings: Shows that LLM-generated improvements become practical when filtered by compilation reliability and measurable coverage increase
relevance_to_project: Strong justification for our compile pass coverage gate before accepting generated tests

title: On the Evaluation of Large Language Models in Unit Test Generation
llm_or_agent_focus: Empirical evaluation of open-source LLMs and prompts
test_generation_focus: Java unit test generation under multiple prompting settings
methodology: Comparative study across open-source LLMs prompt factors GPT-4 and EvoSuite
key_findings: Prompt structure materially affects compilation coverage and usefulness while open-source models remain competitive but imperfect
relevance_to_project: Matches our prompt control and model-comparison design in Phase 1

title: LLM Test Generation via Iterative Hybrid Program Analysis
venue: CoRR abs/2503.13580 and accepted to ICSE 2026
llm_or_agent_focus: Iterative hybrid analysis plus LLM feedback
test_generation_focus: Panta coverage-driven unit test generation for complex methods
methodology: Combines static control-flow analysis dynamic coverage feedback and iterative refinement
key_findings: Reports 26 percent higher line coverage and 23 percent higher branch coverage than prior state of the art on complex code
relevance_to_project: Supports our decision to couple LLM generation with coverage-guided improvement rather than single-shot prompting

title: Test case generation using large language models: a systematic literature review
llm_or_agent_focus: Systematic synthesis of LLM-based testing literature
test_generation_focus: Survey of test generation workflows metrics datasets and integration strategies
methodology: Systematic literature review following Kitchenham-style procedure
key_findings: Finds that coverage remains the dominant metric while dataset quality integration cost and robustness remain open issues
relevance_to_project: Useful for framing our report discussion and threats to validity beyond single-tool comparisons
